title: Evaluation of an adapted semi-automated DNA extraction for human salivary shotgun metagenomics
author: Victoria Meslier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This deposit contains : 

 - a RMarkdown filte containing the codes for the mcirobial analysis of saliva samples 

 - the html report with codes, results and figures 

 - a RData containing microbial datasets (MSp species abundance table, genus, family and phylum abundance tables, matrix of genes correlations, taxonomy) 

 - a RData containing associated metadata
